word: G4887 - συνδέω - syndéō - soon-deh'-o - Be bound with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be bound with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to tie together, to bind together
2. to bind or fasten on all sides
3. to bind just as (jointly with) another
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and G1210; to bind with, that is, (passively) be a fellow prisoner (figuratively): - be bound with.
